hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASP operations teams consolidate onboarding, monitoring and review processes into one compliance layer that preserves audit evidence and streamlines case flow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams rely heavily on spreadsheets and disconnected tools to manage onboarding and reviews. This creates inefficiencies, duplicated efforts, and weak audit trails that complicate regulatory and bank due diligence for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider outputs, manual reviews and case evidence within one scalable workflow, reducing spreadsheet handoffs and creating an auditable trail for operational teams at VASPs.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY captures fragmented provider checks and moves them through rules, reviews, case creation and decisions into structured evidence for regulatory readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond manual handoffs. One provider-neutral layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and evidence, reducing manual handoffs and strengthening compliance auditability for digital asset operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance operations by unifying fragmented provider outputs into audit-ready workflows with controlled deployment and bank due diligence readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY reduce spreadsheet handoffs in compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY structures case workflows to reduce manual reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence preserves provider check integrity
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY supports provider orchestration across compliance tools
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY serves VASP compliance teams by connecting fragmented KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into connected workflows, cases, evidence and reports to streamline digital asset compliance.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY reduce manual spreadsheet handoffs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY reduces manual handoffs by structuring and automating review workflows, routing provider outputs into a controlled compliance layer instead of relying on spreadsheets or separate dashboards.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence to provide a traceable, audit-ready record of compliance actions and internal rule applications for reviews and inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY sits above your existing providers, connecting their outputs via integrations to connect onboarding, KYT monitoring, Travel Rule workflows, case management and reporting processes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening providers but complements them by turning their outputs into structured workflows, audit evidence and reporting workflows.
final_title: Turn fragmented workflows into one compliance layer
final_description: Review how SFTY reduces manual handoffs by connecting provider outputs into structured cases and audit-ready compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
